name: The Seven Sword Formation of Celestial Heart (Secret)

system.description:
Discipline: None
Skill: Medium Melee or Heavy Melee (any sword)
Type: Normal
Qi: 7

You and your allies raise your swords and slice the sky as you flip back through the air creating arcs of light that produce a protective dome of energy. Make a Medium or Heavy Melee roll against TN 7. On a success you contribute energy to a protective dome that deflects incoming attacks. This requires two or more participants (but no more than seven) who all know the technique. Everyone who succeeds on the roll can add their Qi Rank to the Integrity of the dome. The Dome’s hardiness is equal to the 3 plus the number of participants. The total Qi ranks of the participants also produce the size of the dome (10 feet per rank of Qi).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Medium Melee or Heavy Melee (any sword)
system.requirementNotes: This requires two or more participants (but no more than seven) who all know the technique.
